reviews.review_title: This game is like better then gorillatag
reviews.review_description: It is easy this game is wayyyy better then gorilla tag

I lost hope in the quest. I thought that there wasn’t any more good games. But then I found this gem. I am shocked that this isn’t more popular, as it clearly superior to every other game out there. Especially gorilla tag. Gorilla tag devs are disgusting, how DARE they copy this game? This great, legendary, downright spankalishious game. They are leaches trying to gain some fame. This game is of the highest quality. It’s ultra HD 4K graphics make you feel really immersed in its environments. Clearly, this is a game for the coolest of the kids. If you don’t play this game, I feel bad for you. You haven’t experienced this absolute gem and banger of a game. This game is for the cool kids, and I, and everyone else who has played this, is indeed a cool, swag kid. Thank you, for gifting us this game. And yes, I am all 6 of Rtidz’s girlfriends. Oh, and I almost forgot the masterpiece of a soundtrack featured in this game. The vibes and tunes they produce put you in the perfect mood to play the game with your friends. The soundtrack truly mixes well with the design to make you feel immersed. This game perfectly captures what running around using your hands as the legendary floppa would feel like. 5/5 stars, would give this 52.2817/5 if I could.
